_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens, organized into DATED SCHEDULES. The schedule applied to a turn is the latest one whose effective_from (YYYY-MM-DD) is <= the turn's date. When Anthropic changes prices, APPEND a new schedule with a later effective_from — never edit a past schedule except to correct an error. The Stop hook stamps each turn with cost_usd + pricing_from using the schedule in effect that day (the immutable 'Actual' spend); reports also show a 'Today' column re-priced at the current schedule. Cache multipliers (Anthropic standard): cache_write_5m = 1.25x input, cache_write_1h = 2x input, cache_read = 0.1x input. Base input/output rates cached 2026-05-26 from the claude-api skill; verify at https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/pricing .
